name: the-architect
// workspace_explanation: This is an npm workspaces monorepo. It contains multiple 'apps' and 'packages' that work together.

scripts.// build_explanation: Builds all apps and packages in the monorepo.
scripts.// dev_explanation: Starts the entire project (Web, API, Worker) in development mode.
scripts.// lint_explanation: Checks all code for common mistakes and styling issues.
scripts.// test_explanation: Runs unit tests in all packages.
scripts.// typecheck_explanation: Ensures TypeScript is correct across all projects.
scripts.// redis_explanation: Helper commands for managing the Redis container via Docker.
scripts.// workflow_docker_loop_explanation: Runs the Docker-based integration validation loop used by agent workflows.
scripts.// test_integration_explanation: Runs the integration tests (requires services to be running).
